---
title: "fix_ts_errors.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/fix_ts_errors.js"
loc: 101
complexity: 2
logic_score: 3.97
style_score: 4.56
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 7.00
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fs)

### Exports
- `fixFile`
- `content`
